scenarios.notes: Minnesota Twins (away) @ Cleveland Guardians (home) and all three target markets passed the bounded target gate.
Harness 1.1.2, SDK/CLI 0.10.1, market-maker, and API runtime pins passed.
Flow, maker-a, and maker-b identities remained distinct and balances were readable.
All three wallets used bounded allowances and finished with both spender allowances at zero.
The two 15-minute dry lanes covered moneyline, spread, and total without protocol writes.
The isolated maker lane posted only in its approved contest; bounded loaded-state continuations followed KILL and expiry-plus-grace.
A controlled live-MM fill bound to contest 50, speculation 132, and moneyline completed with receipt/readback evidence.
Own-state telemetry observed the target controlled fill with zero stream errors.
Direct postgame reads proved zero target positions, claim plans, open commitments, allowances, and maker processes after the composite doctor caveat.
Loaded-state continuations occurred only after prior quote expiry plus grace and remained within approved scope.
The exact official final matched the R5 scored contest.
All three target speculations settled with successful receipts.
Every winning target position claimed; final direct claim plans were empty.
USDC stakes, payouts, P&L, fees, and POL receipt gas reconciled exactly; each wallet stayed below 2 POL.
